step_by_step_reasoning: The transcript describes a cloud operations portal built around Amazon Q. Users authenticate via IAM Identity Center to access the Q app. Q acts as a central hub, indexing data from S3 (PDFs), Web Crawlers, Confluence, and ServiceNow CMDB (which receives configuration snapshots from AWS Config). Users query this data using natural language. Additionally, Q uses plugins to execute write operations, such as creating support tickets directly in external tools like Jira.

graph.name: Generative AI Troubleshooting Hub with Amazon Q
graph.notes: Integrates AWS and third-party silos into a single generative AI natural-language interface using Amazon Q and plugins.

nodes.name: Cloud Operations Engineer
nodes.notes: Interacts with Amazon Q to troubleshoot infrastructure issues.

nodes.name: AWS IAM Identity Center
nodes.notes: Authenticates operators and publishes the Amazon Q application portal.

nodes.name: Amazon Q Business
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Central Hub indexing documents and utilizing plugins for action execution.

nodes.name: Amazon S3
nodes.notes: DATA_PEEK: Stores PDFs and documentation indexed by Amazon Q.

nodes.name: Web Crawler
nodes.notes: Crawls specified web domains to ingest external support info.

nodes.name: Confluence
nodes.notes: Internal knowledge base and wiki indexed by Amazon Q.

nodes.name: ServiceNow CMDB
nodes.notes: CMDB containing infrastructure state, integrated with AWS Config.

nodes.name: AWS Config
nodes.notes: Supplies resource state snapshots to the ServiceNow CMDB.

nodes.name: Jira
nodes.notes: Ticketing platform integrated with Amazon Q plugins for write actions.

edges.notes: User authenticates to access Q app.
Redirects to the authenticated Amazon Q portal interface.
AWS Config syncs resource state to ServiceNow CMDB.
Q indexes documentation from S3 buckets.
Q crawls external domains to ingest web pages.
Q indexes internal knowledge from Confluence.
Q queries CMDB for real-time asset data.
User queries Q via natural language chat.
Q returns answered query details back to user.
User requests Q to create a support ticket.
Q writes ticket details directly into Jira using plugin.
Jira sends confirmation / follow-up email back to the user.
